allow: Bash(cmd /c 'for /f "usebackq eol=# tokens=1,* delims==" %a in \(".env"\) do @if not "%a"=="" @echo %a=%b')
Bash(printf '@echo off\\r\\nfor /f "usebackq eol=# tokens=1,* delims==" %%%%a in \(".env"\) do if not "%%%%a"=="" echo %%%%a=%%%%b\\r\\n')
Bash(printf '@echo off\\r\\ncd /d "D:\\\\3-work\\\\devkit"\\r\\nfor /f "usebackq eol=# tokens=1,* delims==" %%%%a in \(".env"\) do if not "%%%%a"=="" echo %%%%a=%%%%b\\r\\n')
